blog_title: 5 Activities You Cannot Miss In Vietnam
seo_title: 5 Activities You Cannot Miss In Vietnam
description: Discover the ultimate travel packing list for every adventure. Pack smart, light, and stress-free with essential tips .
body_content:
Published by travelxploria on Thu Jun 19 2025

Vietnam is a traveler’s paradise in many ways. When you choose the best Vietnam couple package, there are certain activities that you would love to enjoy. From serene river cruises to trekking through terraced rice fields, Vietnam offers a diverse range of experiences that promise to leave an indelible mark on your travel memories.

​A Vietnam Tour Packages Should Include These 5 Activities

​Go on a relaxing cruise along the Mekong River:

As you drift along the iconic Mekong River, you will witness the vibrant life around it. You can see the scenes of floating markets, traditional villages, and lush landscapes unfold before your eyes. The Mekong Delta is a mesmerizing labyrinth of waterways, and a cruise offers a unique perspective on the local way of life. It allows you to immerse yourself in the beauty of Vietnam’s natural wonders.

Trek through the terraced rice fields of Sapa:

Nestled in the northern mountains, Sapa is home to ethnic minority communities and some of the most breathtaking scenery in Vietnam. For those seeking adventure amidst stunning landscapes, a trek through the terraced rice fields of Sapa is a must. The trek not only offers a physical challenge but also provides an intimate look into the daily lives of the hill tribes, making it a truly enriching experience.

Sample the Exquisite Traditional Dishes:

No visit to Vietnam is complete without indulging in its world-renowned cuisine. On the best couple tour packages for Vietnam from Kolkata, you can savor the flavors of banh mi, pho, and fresh spring rolls. Banh mi, a French-influenced Vietnamese baguette sandwich, is a perfect street food delight.
Pho, a hearty noodle soup, is a culinary masterpiece that varies from region to region. Fresh spring rolls, bursting with herbs and local ingredients, offer a refreshing taste of Vietnamese gastronomy.

Check out the ancient ruins of My Son:

Step back in time by visiting the ancient ruins of My Son, a UNESCO World Heritage Site that stands testament to Vietnam’s rich history. Nestled in a lush valley surrounded by mountains, My Son was the religious and political capital of the Champa Kingdom for centuries.

The well-preserved temples and towers showcase intricate carvings and architectural marvels, providing a glimpse into the spiritual and cultural heritage of Vietnam. Exploring the My Son ruins can add depth to your understanding of the country.

Explore the Ancient Temples and Pagodas of Vietnam:

Vietnam is home to many ancient temples and pagodas that reflect its spiritual heritage. From the iconic Temple of Literature in Hanoi to the serene Perfume Pagoda, each site holds a unique charm. These architectural marvels not only showcase the religious diversity of the country but also offer moments of tranquility amidst the hustle and bustle of modern life. Visiting these sacred places offers an opportunity to connect with Vietnam’s spiritual essence and appreciate the beauty of its cultural legacy.

A journey through Vietnam on the best tour packages helps couples get diverse experiences that capture the essence of this enchanting country. So, pack your bags and get ready for an adventure that you will cherish for a lifetime.
